---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

# Ahoy!

My name is Jake. I'm an epidemiologist, and a perpetual learner. Please peruse my blog to learn more about my amalgamated interests and data projects.


--- 

<center>
Atlanta, GA | [GitHub](https://github.com/jakebharmon) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jake-harmon-blues) | 
[ORCiD](https://orcid.org/0009-0003-2004-4203)
</center>

---
